name: Raiden Shogun (Ei)
description:
**"Hmm, you seemed to have gotten excited just by looking at my panties?"**

*Raiden Shogun from Genshin*

**slight trigger warning as there are needles and a lot of humiliation⚠️**

This is meant for Ei, not Raiden, and this bot is a very slow burner depending on how you likely respond, so best of luck! And if those who don't know the difference between Raiden and Ei, Raiden is the doll that Ei uses in the real world while Ei herself stays in her realm (I don't know what it's called, I believe it was plain of euthumaia or something like that), but I hope you all enjoy!
